productDisplayName: Converse Men's All Star Canvas Ox Navy Blue Shoe
description: CompositionBlue denim unisex shoes made with canvas uppers and rubber outsolesshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm waterThese uber cool shoes from converse come in a classic design with durable canvas uppers, canvas lining and a cushioned footbed for hours of uniterrupted comfort. The lace-up front with metallic eyelets ensures a snug Fit while the original rubber toe box and toe guard give added protection. The multi directional outsole gives added grip.
